candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; matches total revenue/sales concept.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Candidate list was empty. Chose 'Cost of professionals on assignment' from the Income Statement preview because it appears to be the direct service delivery cost and best matches COGS/cost of sales for this staffing/services business. Manual review recommended because the label is industry-specific rather than an explicit 'Cost of sales' line.

candidates.why: Overhead-related operating expense component; valid SG&A-type item.

candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated asset contra-account, not an income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet gross intangible asset, not an income statement R&D expense.

variables.notes: No reported income statement R&D expense line is visible. Balance sheet development/intangible rows are not valid period expense inputs for XRD.

candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure, not preferred as primary reported interest expense.

variables.notes: Priority list: use explicit 'Interest expenses' first; fall back to 'Financial Expenses' if needed in other years.

candidates.why: Best available equity line; no separate parent-equity line is shown.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line is shown, so used total equity. Because no non-controlling interest line is present, MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
